title: TCW Launcher 0.3.11 Beta
summary: Ships the TCWA3 quality push with Community and Quests hubs, profile reliability fixes, admin controls, launcher polish, logo scaling, and Galactic Requesitions locked for a future release.
notes: Community and Quests hubs are now available in the website and launcher.
Profile/auth handling, roster fallback, avatar persistence, and expanded preflight coverage were improved.
Galactic Requesitions is intentionally locked with a coming-future panel until economy and grant controls are ready.
Launcher buttons, light theme readability, and logo scaling were polished.
